description.zh-Hans: 从横向或网格精灵表中按时间轴提取当前帧，支持循环、往返、单次和反向播放。
description.en: Extracts the current frame from a strip or grid sprite sheet with loop, ping-pong, once and reverse playback.

triggers.zh-Hans: 精灵表动画, 帧动画, sprite sheet, 逐帧播放
triggers.en: sprite sheet animation, frame animation, sprite playback

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 输入精灵表，设置列数与行数；需要手动控制时把帧进度接入帧端口。
exampleUsage.en: Connect a sheet and set rows/columns; connect Frame Progress for manual control.
